question.question_text: How many total points will be scored in the NBA game between New York Knicks and Charlotte Hornets on 2026-03-26?
question.context: New York Knicks (48-25) at Charlotte Hornets (38-34). Regular season NBA game.

prediction.reasoning: The average NBA game in the 2025-26 season scores approximately 220-228 total points. The Knicks are a defensively strong team (top-10 defense) that tends to play at a slower pace and hold opponents to lower scores, which typically suppresses totals. Charlotte has been a middle-of-the-pack offensive team. Knicks games tend to have lower totals than league average due to their defensive identity and pace. Estimating around 224 total points, slightly below league average, reflecting the Knicks' defensive strength. Confidence intervals widen to account for variance in NBA scoring, blowouts, pace variation, and foul trouble scenarios.
